channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Stogie T’s ‘Four Horsemen’ Collaboration Marks a Historic Moment for South African Hip-Hop
item.description: Stogie T, a veteran in South African hip-hop, has earned a nomination for Best Hip-Hop at the 2026 Metro FM Awards for his groundbreaking track 'Four Horsemen'. The song, a collaboration with A-Reece,...

item.title: Dubai Influencers React to Missile Strikes Amid Rising Tensions with Iran
item.description: The luxurious lifestyle of influencers in Dubai was sharply interrupted when Iranian missiles struck the UAE in retaliation for US-Israeli attacks on Iran. Influencers, accustomed to documenting glamo...

item.title: Frank Stronach's Lawyer Cross-Examines Final Complainant in Sexual Assault Trial
item.description: The trial of Frank Stronach, the founder of Magna International, continues as his lawyer, Leora Shemesh, cross-examines the final complainant in a sexual assault case. The woman, now in her late 60s, ...

item.title: Kolu Opens Up About Premature Birth and Its Impact on His Growth
item.description: Hamza Kolu, a popular Nigerian TikToker and streamer, has shared the story behind his physical appearance. Speaking on The Honest Bunch Podcast, Kolu revealed that he was born prematurely at just seve...

item.title: Mo Bimpe Clashes with Fan Over Rumors of Welcoming Twins
item.description: Nollywood actress Mo Bimpe had a public showdown with a social media user after rumors spread that she had given birth to twins. The issue started when Mo Bimpe shared a new month message on her Insta...

item.title: Trump Administration Conducts Unauthorised Strikes on Iran
item.description: The recent US and Israeli military strikes on Iran have sparked significant controversy, with analysts arguing that the Trump administration bypassed key steps typically required before engaging in wa...

item.title: US Consulate in Dubai Hit by Suspected Iranian Drone Amid Growing Middle East Tensions
item.description: Tensions in the Middle East escalate as new military strikes and retaliations continue. The US consulate in Dubai was hit by a suspected Iranian drone, marking a significant escalation. Meanwhile, Pre...

item.title: Key insights from Business Summit Day 2: CEOs discuss NDIS and regulatory challenges
item.description: The second day of the Australian Financial Review's Business Summit saw prominent industry figures raise concerns about regulatory challenges and the National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS). Pacif...

item.title: Man arrested after stand-off in Edinburgh tower block leaves two injured
item.description: A man has been charged following a disturbance in Edinburgh's Calder Gardens area on Monday morning. The incident, which involved a stand-off in the Cobbinshaw House tower block, saw emergency service...

item.title: Pakistan to Build Artificial Island for Offshore Oil Exploration
item.description: Pakistan Petroleum Limited (PPL), the country’s state-owned energy company, has announced a significant project to construct an artificial island approximately 30 kilometres off the coast of Sindh, ne...

item.title: Highway Amenities Struggle to Keep Up with India's Expanding Network
item.description: India’s highway network is growing rapidly, but there is a significant gap in the availability of wayside amenities like rest stops and washrooms. As more people take to the highways for long-distance...

item.title: Governors urge Treasury to release SHA medical cover funds on time
item.description: The Council of Governors (CoG) has called on the National Treasury Cabinet Secretary, John Mbadi, to ensure that funds related to the Social Health Authority (SHA) are released promptly by the 3rd of ...

item.title: Top 3 News Stories: R1m Tender Scandal, Joburg Building Collapse, and Teacher Arrested for Lashing Pupil
item.description: In the latest news this morning, a company named Ithani Amen, which was only registered eight days ago, has been awarded a R1 million tender by the national health department, despite not having a bus...

item.title: Government Calls In-Camera Meeting for Parliamentary Leaders on Regional Affairs
item.description: The Pakistani government has called on parliamentarians to attend an in-camera briefing about the regional situation, scheduled for Wednesday. Law Minister Azan Nazeer Tarar confirmed this in a statem...

item.title: Truphena Muthoni breaks world record hugging a tree for 72 hours
item.description: Twenty-two-year-old environmentalist Truphena Muthoni has successfully broken her own world record by hugging a tree for 72 hours straight, surpassing her previous record of 48 hours. The event took p...

item.title: Tanzania Boosts Security for Citizens and Farms Near Wildlife Reserves
item.description: The Tanzanian government has taken significant steps to enhance the safety of its citizens, especially in villages near protected wildlife areas. In an effort to curb the threat posed by wild animals ...

item.title: South Africa’s Economy Shows Signs of Growth, but Challenges Persist
item.description: South Africa’s economy is showing some positive signs, with government debt starting to stabilise and fiscal reforms underway, but it still faces significant challenges. Despite the optimism in the 20...

item.title: Corrections Report for March 2026 by Rappler
item.description: Rappler has issued a correction report for March 2026. The corrections include a clarification on AIRA LABS, a startup whose AI software plays a key role in Naga City's digital operations. This report...

item.title: Bears center Drew Dalman unexpectedly retires at 27 after stellar career
item.description: Drew Dalman, the Pro Bowl center for the Chicago Bears, has announced his retirement at just 27 years old, shocking the NFL community. Dalman had a standout career, playing five seasons in the league....

item.title: The Complex History Behind US-Iran Tensions
item.description: The US-Iran relationship is not a simple tale of good versus evil but a complex, long-standing conflict rooted in mutual fear and misinterpretation. The cycle of tension between these two nations bega...
